dps3xx_init.message0: Initialize DPS3xx sensor I2C address %1 using %2
dps3xx_init.tooltip: Initialize Infineon DPS3xx high-precision barometric pressure and temperature sensor via I2C

dps3xx_read_temperature.tooltip: Read temperature from DPS3xx sensor in Celsius. Higher oversampling improves precision but takes longer

dps3xx_read_pressure.tooltip: Read pressure from DPS3xx sensor in Pascal. Higher oversampling improves precision but takes longer

dps3xx_correct_temp.tooltip: Fix hardware temperature measurement issue on some DPS3xx sensors, recommended to call right after begin()

dps3xx_get_product_id.tooltip: Get the product identification number of the DPS3xx sensor

dps3xx_get_revision_id.tooltip: Get the revision identification number of the DPS3xx sensor
